analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with existing CSS and HTML files. The event specifies a theme about black holes with bulk animated objects, slides, and animated pages. The current CSS files likely need enhancement to fully implement cosmic/dark space themes with black hole animations, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML files need completion to include all sections related to black holes with proper navigation and mobile responsiveness.

improvements.description: Enhance CSS with cosmic dark theme, black hole animations, swirling effects, glowing elements, and interactive planet animations.
Complete HTML with black hole sections, interactive planets, animated slides, and mobile-friendly navigation with hamburger menu.
Implement JavaScript for animated slides, interactive elements, and mobile menu toggle with smooth transitions.
